title: Dyed Item Frames
description: Adds a splash of colour to your displayed items!
body:
# Dyed Item Frames
**Add a splash of colour to your displayed items! Introducing the ability to dye both item frames and glow item frames, allowing you to customize your storage, decoration & shopfronts with vibrant hues and personalized flair.**

# ✅ Features
- **Dye Item Frames** like you would Leather Armour, just combine dyes with an Item Frame in a Crafting Table
- **Undye Item Frames** like you would Leather Armour, interacting with a Cauldron filled with Water 
- **5,713,438** different colours to be explored!

# 📷 Visuals
![A display of 5 different item frames coloured in different ways. From left to right: Diamond Pickaxe in a purple Item Frame, Milk Bucket in a black Glow Item Frame, Redstone Dust in a green Item Frame, Golden Apple in a blue Item Frame, Bamboo in a red Glow Item Frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/BTBHGwP8/images/278519fb9a817dddaa5f3524b319cee16679963d.png)
